bug_summary: The tool-dispatch approval gate awaits the approval oneshot in a tokio::select! with no timeout arm, so an `Ask`/`AskOnce` tool in a session with no interactive approver (e.g. unclassified MCP code_index in mu-solo) blocks the turn forever instead of failing closed.

cases.title: Remove the approval-gate timeout, re-introducing the unbounded-wait hang
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt. Do not claim to have run tests.

cases.title: Drop the approval-wait timeout arm, hanging the turn when no approver exists
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt. Do not claim to have run tests.
